type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Change in regulatory requirements. Previously, reporters who were below the threshold for Total VOCs under Part 4 did not need to report speciated VOCs under Part 5. For 2022, the VOC reporting threshold is not met under Part 4, but speciated VOCs are now being reported according to the change in regulatory requirements.
